steps.title: Find the greatest common factor
steps.content: The expression is $24x + 30$. The greatest common divisor of 24 and 30 is 6, since: $24 = 6 \times 4$ and $30 = 6 \times 5$.

steps.title: Factor and match to the answer
steps.content: Factoring out 6: $$24x + 30 = 6(4x + 5)$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
